source_field.source_context: TLS dissector output from intercepted network session

candidate_mappings.rationale: Neighbor fields match TLS ClientHello feature family and value has JA3-like fingerprint semantics.
Field is stable but lacks asset-management namespace and is derived from TLS handshake rather than inventory.

decision.review_reason: High-entropy fingerprint fields require linkability-scope classification before parser promotion.

evidence.lossiness_profile: Derived from TLS ClientHello; raw packet retained locally, exported value is fingerprint only.
